\footnotesize
\textit{Notes:} $\Delta = (\hat\beta_{k_{\max}} - \hat\beta_{k_0}) / |\hat\beta_{k_0}|$. At $k = 0$ the far-post bin contains only the endpoint period and treated observations outside the event window are excluded; at $k_{\max}$ the bin absorbs all available horizons. Controls are restricted to the calendar-time range of the remaining treated observations at each $k$. \dag~indicates $\hat\beta_{k=0}$ is not statistically significant at the 5\% level; percentage changes for these articles are mechanically large and should be interpreted with caution.
